turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Hello, how are you today? I would like to order a iced black coffee. Yeah.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! One iced black coffee coming up. Would you like that in a small, medium, or large cup?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: A large cub.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, one large iced black coffee. Would you like any sugar or sweetener with that?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: No, thanks, and I want a cappuccino and a flat white to go away.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it — one large iced black coffee, plus a cappuccino and a flat white to go. What size would you like for the cappuccino and the flat white?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Both of them are middle, and also I want to chocolate muffin.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect — one large iced black coffee, two medium coffees (a cappuccino and a flat white), and a chocolate muffin. Would you like the muffin warmed up?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, I need to roast. Sorry, I want to change the size of flat white. I want to change it to large cup.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No problem — so that’s a large flat white instead of medium, right? Would you like everything packed together in one bag or separately?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yeah, they need to be separated.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it — each drink and the muffin will be packed separately. Would you like to pay by cash or card?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I want to pay by card and I want to order other desserts. What do you recommend today?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! Today we’ve got some fresh desserts — tiramisu, cheesecake, and almond croissants are really popular. Would you like something creamy like tiramisu, or more pastry-style like the croissant?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I want to eat a disease with scream and also not too much sugar in it.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Ah, I think you mean a dessert with cream and not too sweet, right? In that case, I’d recommend our vanilla cheesecake — it’s smooth, creamy, and not overly sugary. Would you like a slice of that?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, of course.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great! I’ll add one slice of vanilla cheesecake. Would you like to have it here or take it away too?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I will wait near the door, and when you prepared, I can get.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, I’ll bring it to you by the door when it’s ready. Would you like a receipt with your order?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Oh, thanks. Mmm, long black and cheesecake, I will eat there. And others, please help me to package it to get takeaway.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! So you’ll have the long black and cheesecake here, and the cappuccino, flat white, and muffin packed to go. Is that all for your order today?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, alright, have a nice day.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Thanks a lot! Enjoy your coffee and dessert — have a great day too!
